description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a mix of wood, glass, and concrete materials, with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious wooden deck. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool and a sunbathing area with lounge chairs. The front of the house has a paved driveway leading to a covered entrance, partially shaded by a pergola. The house is two stories tall, with the upper level set back and featuring a balcony overlooking the pool. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, a wooden deck, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a low wall and landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, pergola, and large glass windows with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the wooden deck, swimming pool, and sunbathing area, with minimal windows on this facade.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, deck, and upper balcony, with a clear view of the house's flat roof and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, pool, and more of the garden area, with the house's modern lines and glass features visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with a pergola, wide glass doors, and a paved driveway leading up to the entrance.
